_meta.description: Page clean-name -> canonical category. Applied both in inferCategoryMap (on the Pages-panel canvas name) and as a fallback in transform-registry's per-component category lookup (on each component's own containing_frame.pageName), so an override still resolves when the canvas name and the component's reported page name diverge. Keys are clean-names (status emoji stripped) so they survive the emoji changing. `exclude` drops a page's components entirely (staging / not-ready). Self-retiring: delete an entry once Figma encodes the category natively and a re-sync restores it.
_meta.remove_when: Figma re-encodes these pages so the sync attributes their category natively; a re-sync then restores it and the entry can be deleted.
_meta._history: 2026-07-12: 'DS Icons: replacement' was moved OUT of `exclude` and INTO `overrides`. It was excluded on 2026-07-08 as a staging page. Since then the 2026-07 icon rework MOVED the real icon library onto it: 201 of the 237 registry icon components are main components on that page today. Excluding it therefore deleted the entire Icons category (237 -> 0), which the category mass-loss tripwire correctly refused to publish, so the nightly Figma sync failed every night from 2026-07-10. Do NOT re-add it to `exclude` while the icons live there.
